archetype: Automated Tissue Banking and Histocompatibility Testing Management System for Corneal Transplantation
description: This system manages the collection, processing, storage, and distribution of donated corneal tissue for transplantation, while ensuring histocompatibility testing and adherence to FDA regulations. It is used by tissue bank personnel, surgeons, and researchers. Technical challenges arise from integrating with laboratory information systems, managing complex tissue matching algorithms, and ensuring regulatory compliance.
rules: MUST integrate with laboratory information systems (LIS) for automated testing result retrieval and update
MUST comply with FDA regulations for human tissue donation and transplantation (21 CFR Part 1271)
MUST implement histocompatibility testing using HLA typing and cross-matching protocols
MUST track and manage tissue storage and distribution, including cryopreservation and thawing procedures
MUST ensure secure and auditable electronic records and signatures (ER/ES) for regulatory compliance
anti_patterns: DO NOT use a generic inventory management system, as it will not account for tissue-specific handling and testing requirements
DO NOT rely solely on manual data entry, as it will introduce errors and compromise data integrity
DO NOT neglect to implement robust security measures, as sensitive donor and recipient information must be protected
key_technical_challenges: Developing a tissue matching algorithm that accounts for multiple HLA loci and antigen mismatching
Integrating with diverse laboratory information systems and instrumentation
Ensuring secure and auditable electronic records and signatures (ER/ES) for regulatory compliance

recommended_stack.language: Python, due to its extensive libraries for scientific computing and data analysis
recommended_stack.framework: Django, for its robust security features and support for complex data models
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL, for its ability to handle complex queries and ensure data integrity
recommended_stack.cache: Redis, for its high-performance caching and support for real-time data updates
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ, for its reliable message queuing and support for distributed systems
